title: ehrharta triandra
intro: Ehrharta triandra, also known as the blue tussock grass or blue grass, is a species of grass native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Ehrharta triandra can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
